violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (baskets) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026

French Fries were observed held at 98-103 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC reheated at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026

Menu does not have an allergy statement notifying customers of their obligation to notify staff if they have a food allergy. Per person in charge, an allergy statement will be posted. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024
